creator: m.seaman@infracaninophile.co.uk
text:
Routine bug-fix update.

Announce message:

  "Welcome to phpMyAdmin 3.1.2, a bugfix-only version.

   Details will appear on http://phpmyadmin.net. In a hurry? you can
   visit http://sourceforge.net/projects/phpmyadmin.

   Marc Delisle, for the team"

ChangeLog:

   http://sourceforge.net/project/shownotes.php?group_id=23067&release_id=654839
